name: Double Extension File Found in Summary of CrowdStrike
description: This CrowdStrike alert indicates that a file with a double extension (e.g., '.txt.zip') was detected, which may be associated with suspicious or unauthorized activity. This is often used to bypass security measures by disguising the true nature of the file.

filterSets.name: Double Extension File Found in Summary of CrowdStrike

author: Mark Chester De Quiroz
